executionHints.description: Checklist B keeps state-only continuation and focuses on rule-table helper extraction, match-layer assignment helpers and finalize-inline policy consolidation

d1ResetRequirement.notes: D1 remains reset-sensitive to avoid stale code-step state

D1.description: Add rule-table lookup helpers and route inline row-assignment logic through them

operations.pattern:
if \(inet_pton\(AF_INET, normalized, &addr4\) == 1\) \{?
		const wc_preclass_table_row_t\* row;?
		unsigned char b\[4\];?
		uint32_t ip;?
		memcpy\(b, &addr4, sizeof\(b\)\);?
		ip = \(\(	uint32_t\)b\[0\]\) << 24\) \|?
			\(\(	uint32_t\)b\[1\]\) << 16\) \|?
			\(\(	uint32_t\)b\[2\]\) << 8\) \|?
			\(\(uint32_t\)b\[3\]\);?
		if \(!wc_preclass_lookup_row_v4\(ip, &row\)\)?
			return 0;?
		\*family = wc_preclass_family_v4_literal\(\);?
		wc_preclass_assign_from_row\(row, cls, rir, reason, confidence\);?
		return 1;?
	\}

if \(inet_pton\(AF_INET6, normalized, &addr6\) == 1\) \{?
		const wc_preclass_table_row_t\* row;?
		const unsigned char\* b = addr6.s6_addr;?
		uint64_t hi = wc_preclass_read_be64\(b\);?
		uint64_t lo = wc_preclass_read_be64\(b \+ 8\);?
		if \(!wc_preclass_lookup_row_v6\(hi, lo, &row\)\)?
			return 0;?
		\*family = wc_preclass_family_v6_literal\(\);?
		wc_preclass_assign_from_row\(row, cls, rir, reason, confidence\);?
		return 1;?
	\}

if \(inet_pton\(AF_INET, normalized, &addr4\) == 1\) \{?
		const wc_preclass_table_row_t\* row;?
		unsigned char b\[4\];?
		uint32_t ip;?
		memcpy\(b, &addr4, sizeof\(b\)\);?
		ip = \(\(\(uint32_t\)b\[0\]\) << 24\) \|?
			\(\(\(uint32_t\)b\[1\]\) << 16\) \|?
			\(\(\(uint32_t\)b\[2\]\) << 8\) \|?
			\(\(uint32_t\)b\[3\]\);?
		if \(!wc_preclass_lookup_row_v4\(ip, &row\)\)?
			return 0;?
		\*family = wc_preclass_family_v4_literal\(\);?
		wc_preclass_assign_from_row\(row, cls, rir, reason, confidence\);?
		return 1;?
	}

D2.description: Introduce reusable CIDR/non-CIDR query-kind resolution helpers and replace inline parse-cidr result checks

operations.pattern: static const char\* wc_preclass_normalized_query_for_match\(int query_is_cidr, const char\* cidr_base, const char\* query\)

static int wc_preclass_decision_cidr_query_matches\(const char\* query, char\* cidr_base, size_t base_len, int\* out_prefix\)?
\{?
	return wc_preclass_parse_cidr_query\(query, cidr_base, base_len, out_prefix\);?
\}?
?
void wc_preclass_resolve_decision_fields

D3.description: Extract inline decision action mapping helpers and replace duplicated action-category checks
